feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A Shadow Of A Ghost
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,765Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 1,795

Summary: Danyal Al Ghul was the younger twin brother of Damian Al Ghul, and destined to be his brother’s right hand man, the ghost that whispered the secrets of others in his ear. Danyal was a dangerous foe to have, one that could look at you and know all of your secrets, one that could vanish right in front of you. So, it was both the saddest and the happiest day when Danyal Al Ghul and his guards disappeared, all thought to be dead, when he was ten.Danny Fenton was the quiet weird kid that the strange, eccentric Drs. Maddie and Jack Fenton found and adopted one day. He was deathly silent, and yet with one look from his piercing blue eyes he could silence you. Even with his weird aura around him, he managed to pull two of the only other weird kids into being his best friends. The three of them were inseparable and seemed to have developed their own silent communications.Danny is weirdly smart about certain things and yet seems to be failing his English class. Danny is forced to write an essay that just so happens to win his English class a week-long trip to Gotham. Surely nothing could go wrong with a group of teenagers from Amity Park and the two adults accompanying them in Gotham?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: So This Is How Multiverse Lawsuits Start
entry.summary:
Author: MaskSoully

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,048Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 128

Summary: You’re fictional,” Francesca says, already regretting it. Superman stares at her.Batman exhales “I suspected,” he says.“YOU WHAT,” Francesca shrieks.Bruce Wayne sets her phone on the counter. Her phone. The one she didn't even notice was missing. “There are films about us.”Clark goes very, very still.Francesca covers her face with her hands. “I’m so sorry. Don't tell me you went into Twitter,” Francesca gasps, "Don't tell me you went into Ao3"Bruce quirked his eyebrow in response. "Oh man..."Francesca was just a girl. A normal girl. Definitely a little too online. More enamored with a world filled with superheroes and powers. Worlds she could never touch.Until Superman and Batman appear in her kitchen.Now Francesca is tangled in something much bigger than fandom and fiction: a government conspiracy, impossible technology, and the unsettling realization that these two men didn’t cross worlds because of a threat in theirs—But because someone in hers figured out how to pull them through.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Brother even before the Blood
entry.summary:
Author: neihusaingsfan

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,470Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 107

Summary: It has been almost 2 years since Damian moved in with the Waynes, he no longer tries to kill Tim but he is not open to the Batfamily, that is except Jason. The family knew they were close but never how close. Tims a teen and not used to being a older or younger brother and Cass sometimes misses home. Who is Jason if now trying to be better than the Bats.ORThe Batfamily notices just how close Jason and Damian are, Tim and Cass get emotionally adopted in the wayFUCK AI THEY WILL TAKE MY EM DASHES FROM MY DEAD HANDS

entry.title: Eternity
entry.summary:
Author: Nat_isguiltyassin

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,194Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 54

Summary: In the afterlife, you have to pick who you’ll spend eternity with. Clark ends up stuck between Lois, his ex-wife, the love he lost young, and Bruce, his current husband, the father of his kids, who has been by his side for more than 65 years. Who will Clark choose? This is basically the Eternity movie but superbat.

entry.title: Am I making you feel Sick
entry.summary:
Author: fanofthegirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,919Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 625

Summary: Hal Jordan was dying long before a mission went wrong and his heart finally gave out. He was dying when he signed the divorce papers. Dying without making it anyone else’s problem. No one Noticed.Not Bruce. Not Clark. Not the Justice League. And Hal was fine with that because twenty months ago he signed away the right to have anyone worry about him. He would have kept it that way, too If he hadn’t burned himself out saving the world. If he hadn’t collapsed hard enough that everyone finally had to look. Now Bruce and Clark are hovering like they never spent nearly two years avoiding him. Acting like this is their burden to carry, like they didn’t already decide, once, that letting him go was easier than staying. Hal doesn’t understand it. There’s no cure. If Oa hasn’t found one, there’s no point in pretending otherwise. He’s made peace with dying. Bruce and Clark haven’t. They refuse to give up on him the way they gave up on the marriage. And that more than the poison in his blood or the ache in his chest is what hurts the most. Because Hal is still in love with them. And loving them while they fight to save him might be the one thing he can’t survive.

entry.title: Dark Knight, Red Sun
entry.summary:
Author: AngelsInParadise

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,135Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Bruce stopped, standing close now, the distance between them charged. “I like control,” he murmured, his hand brushing against the back of Clark’s chair. “I like knowing… exactly how far someone will go. And I like testing boundaries.” Clark’s breath hitched, but he didn’t step back. “Then… test me.”

entry.title: Reroll Guide: Kryptonian Build Unlock Via Aggressive Matchmaking
entry.summary:
Author: RevasLavellan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,954Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 30

Summary: She has died in Gotham enough times to write a book on “101 creative ways to die” and develop an opinion on game balance—whoever designed this hell-broken death-trap disguised as a city deserves jail. Preferably in Arkham. Preferably right between Joker and Riddler. So when she finally rolled a miracle jackpot account—Bruce Wayne’s daughter—she does the only sensible thing every true hard-core gamer would do: panic and drop an irresponsible amount of money on a premium trait for better survivability…only to be hit with the worst unlock prerequisite she has ever seen—namely getting the World’s Finest to fall in love on schedule. Now she has a rare build, a ticking origin-story deadline, and two stubborn not-yet-legendary future parents who are somehow both intelligent yet completely, impossibly useless at following obvious romantic instructions. …It really would be easier if Batman was being less Batman about it. Well, Claire will just have to show them how extreme a Player can get to preserve her hard-won Kryptonian build. If she has to take matters into her own hands and personally drag this timeline to the altar by its ankles, then so be it. Trust me, the universe will cooperate.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 201,820Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 358

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Save a horse (ride a cowboy)
entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,655Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 329

Summary: A small mistake that involved burning down of mayor's family yacht, lands city boy Bruce Wayne in his aunt's small town ranch in Texas where he's disciplined by the dust in his lungs, blisters on his hands and a cowboy, who makes him forget why he ever wanted to leave in the first place.

entry.title: Worst First (Impression)
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,379Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 57

Summary: Years ago, in Smallville, Bruce made an impression on Clark. And not a good one. Now Bruce is back in his life—charming, relentless, and completely unaware of the damage he left behind all those years ago. But Clark hasn't forgotten. And while Batman and Superman learn how to trust each other, their civilian identities are busy getting everything wrong.

entry.title: Stephanie Brown's Guide to Getting Batman Laid
entry.summary:
Author: almondrose

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,565Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 144

Summary: Everyone knows that Bruce is about a million times nicer the day after he gets laid. Maybe even a billion times nicer. The days after he’s had some sweet, sweet lovin’ are the days where he cracks a smile at Dick’s puns, passes out high-fives to Steph, gives hugs to Tim, twirls Cass around the kitchen, ruffles Damian’s hair, and lets Jason off with a warning and maybe even a wink. Or Steph is pretty sure having a girlfriend would solve all of Batman’s problems. The only problem is finding somebody who's willing to be tied to Bruce for the foreseeable future.

entry.title: Sabbatical
entry.summary:
Author: xoxo_yours

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,609Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 28

Summary: After a dangerous leak puts their identities at risk, the Justice League and their allies are forced into a months-long lockdown in a single, secure, and extremely luxurious safehouse. No missions. No patrols. No leaving. Cut off from their normal lives and forced to drop their aliases, they’re left with nothing but each other. What could possibly go wrong? Alternatively: everyone is stuck in a house together and it's going terribly.

entry.title: Maybe Someone, Somewhere Else
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,719Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 72

Summary: They both knew the unspoken rule. Knew that breaking it would bring an end to a partnership that had sustained them for almost a decade, the balance so delicate that a whisper would ruin it. And here Clark was, practically shouting it from the rooftops. Bruce couldn't allow that to happen. (Or: When a Superman from another universe lands on the Watchtower, the fallout pushes Bruce and Clark to deal with years of unsaid feelings.)

entry.title: Confessions from the Dumpster
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,686Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: Valentine’s Day is fast approaching and one Clark Kent is tired of receiving piles of gifts and propositions on his desk from the Daily Planet’s most eligible bachelorettes. Bruce Wayne swoops in with a plan to help his very good friend, Clark! If they both pretend to date one another, Clark can have peace at work and Billionaire Playboy Brucie Wayne can rest easy this coming Valentine’s Day! In other words… Friends who regularly dumpster dive together (read: get thrown into dumpsters together while fighting the forces of evil) stay together! At least, that’s the theory Clark is going with. Is it too much to hope that this deal with Bruce doesn’t end up a raging trash fire and that their friendship can survive their little game of pretend?

entry.title: All The Things We Cannot See
entry.summary:
Author: Ivasa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,492Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 33

Summary: People disappear in Gotham every day. It is Batman’s job to find them. His job becomes significantly harder when Matches Malone keeps running into a very persistent rookie reporter from Metropolis. A reporter who keeps showing up exactly where he shouldn’t be. Seriously, how does this kid keep finding him???

entry.title: I'll believe in Anything (Superbat)
entry.summary:
Author: elzabethtay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,120Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 30

Summary: I can't believe I haven't written Superbat once on this account, anyways, yes there is smut but it's a lovey-dovey sorta fic, also, you can imagine Bruce and Clark to be any of their portrayals or hell even any sort of fancast that you like that aren't specified in the tags, ENJOY! again I'm being serious here, English is genuinely my second language.
